report.summary: Cycle-close Apr 1 v7: New commit 3b2dd28 landed — removed 'use client' from 4 learn pages fixing Vercel build. TS errors dropped 147→141. 1,240 pages on disk, 626 published slugs. 6/6 API routes present. 29 uncommitted files (report growth). Deploy still pending push.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: NEW COMMIT since v5: 3b2dd28 'fix: remove use client from 4 learn pages that export metadata (fixes Vercel build)' — build-breaking conflict resolved for unichain, verkle-trees, appchains, solana-token-extensions guides.
1,240 page.tsx files on disk — STABLE. No new pages created or deleted this cycle.
626 published slugs in working tree. PUBLISH_QUEUE empty. /courses/* added to PUBLISHED_PAGES in latest commit.
141 TypeScript errors — DOWN from 147 in v5 (6 errors eliminated by removing 'use client' directives). Non-blocking (ignoreBuildErrors: true).
5 modified learn pages in working tree — all server components, no 'use client' conflicts. Metadata exports present on all 5.
109 published slugs still missing page.tsx — up from 103 (courses/* slugs added to published list without page.tsx yet). Needs scaffolding cycle.
Network egress blocked — cannot verify live HTTP status codes from sandbox.

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: 6/6 core API routes present on disk: prices, fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, market-dominance, defi-yields — all with route.ts files.
13 total API routes on disk (including cache-stats, health, news-rss, newsletter, notifications, og, admin, standup-email, subscribe).
No code changes to any API route this cycle. Caching layers and fallback patterns unchanged.
Fallback gap persists: defi-yields still lacks stale fallback — low priority, unchanged all day.
CoinGecko free tier in use — rate limit risk on cold-cache bursts persists. No pro key configured.
Network egress blocked — cannot verify live API responses, data freshness, or upstream health from sandbox.

sections.title: DevOps
items: HEAD commit: 3b2dd28 (NEW since v5's 5dad971) — 'fix: remove use client from 4 learn pages that export metadata (fixes Vercel build)'. Build fix commit landed.
29 uncommitted files (up from 26 in v5). Delta: +3 new report/standup JSONs from automated cycles.
7 modified tracked files: 5 learn page.tsx files + 2 skill files. All learn pages now clean server components.
DEPLOY STATUS: Latest commit fixes a real Vercel build issue. If auto-deploy is enabled on push, this should have triggered. Cannot verify Vercel dashboard — egress blocked.
Production build expected to succeed — 141 TS errors are non-blocking. The 'use client' + metadata conflict that broke builds is now resolved.
Uncommitted changes (published-pages.ts mods, OG SVGs, community drafts) still need commit+push to go live.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: Build fix commit 3b2dd28 — resolved 'use client' + metadata export conflict on 4 learn guides. Added /courses/* to published pages.
TS ERROR TREND: 147→141 (improving). Build health trending positive.
CARRY-OVER: 109 published slugs without page.tsx (courses/* newly added). Needs dedicated scaffolding sprint.
CARRY-OVER: 29 uncommitted files need commit+push. Includes 5 modified learn pages, 3 OG SVGs, community drafts, and automated reports.
CARRY-OVER: defi-yields fallback data gap — low priority but persistent.
NO BLOCKERS requiring Jefe's immediate attention. Build fix landed cleanly. Next action: commit uncommitted changes and push to trigger Vercel deploy.
